allow: PowerShell($m = Get-Command mongosh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($m\) { Write-Output "mongosh: $\($m.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "mongosh: NOT FOUND" }; $d = Get-Command mongodump -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { Write-Output "mongodump: $\($d.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "mongodump: NOT FOUND \(tools not installed here - fine, only the backup server needs them\)" })

PowerShell($r = Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "MongoDB backup pull"; $addr = $r | Get-NetFirewallAddressFilter; $port = $r | Get-NetFirewallPortFilter; Write-Output \("RemoteAddress \(allowed\): " + \($addr.RemoteAddress -join ', '\)\); Write-Output \("Protocol/Port: " + $port.Protocol + " " + $port.LocalPort\); Write-Output \("Enabled: " + $r.Enabled + " | Action: " + $r.Action + " | Direction: " + $r.Direction\))

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3070/api/tickets' -TimeoutSec 10; $r.tickets | Select-Object category, prefix, typeSeq, number, status | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $b = @{category='Finance'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3070/api/tickets' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $b -TimeoutSec 10; "Finance -> prefix=$\($r.ticket.prefix\) typeSeq=$\($r.ticket.typeSeq\)  => label $\($r.ticket.prefix\)$\($r.ticket.typeSeq\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(git -C $repo commit -m "Vitals: require only Blood Pressure, Temperature and Heart Rate for nurse/doctor assessment" -m "SpO2, Weight and Height are now optional in both client and server validation." -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>")
PowerShell(git -C $repo diff -- app/appointments/page.js models/Appointment.js models/Dispensing.js app/auth/signin/page.js)
